title: Exceptions, Cleanup, and Context Managers
description: Make the resource inventory survive invalid records, unavailable files, and partial operations. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a failure-resilient inventory importer while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Handle only expected failures at boundaries while preserving diagnostic causes.
Design exception types and messages that support recovery.
Guarantee cleanup with finally and context managers.
